subject: This is really from Tina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I promise!

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181001_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Dear friends, So if your inbox is anything like mine, you have gotten hundreds of messages over the last few days, asking you to help, to support, to dig a little deeper. I know our campaign has sent more than a few of these messages, because we needed to. And you did help. And we are so grateful. While my team and I have been working hard to raise the funds we need to fuel this campaign, and win this oh-so-competitive Minnesota Senate race, there's been a lot of other work going on this weekend. I've seen it in neighborhoods and coffee shops, office parks and strip malls, all over Minnesota. I've seen people of all ages and from all walks of life coming out to talk to their neighbors about this election. One young man told me he was volunteering for the first time because, he said, "I want to have a positive influence on the arc of history, and now is the time." A dad motioned to his two young children and said, "I'm doing it for them." A woman who could have been a grandmother told me that she was volunteering three afternoons a week, and she wants to get to five. I'm just saying, if you want to feel good about the future of Minnesota, and the future of our great democracy -- go find your nearest campaign office, make some new friends, grab a phone or a clipboard, and have a conversation about the future of our state and country, what that future should look like, and what it could look like if we put people before special interests. It's up to us. We are the energy that fuels this democracy; it doesn't work without us. Our voices are powerful, but only if we raise them up. I've got the energy, and I hope you do too, because we need you. Thank you so much. Tina (really) | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help if she is going to win this tough race. ** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Zach Learner, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Hey, people are taking notice:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36de/9e00690/5e37f1a2/2401c531/2579726082/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181001_Palatk_fnd_gq_act__ZL_ettx&source=em18_181001_Palatk_fnd_gq_act__ZL_ettx")
Hello,

Mayor Andrew Gillum is running the most unapologetically progressive campaign in Florida's history -- and folks across the state and country are taking notice.

This weekend, Mayor Gillum packed an auditorium in Palatka, Florida -- which only has a population of just over 10,000 and is in a county Donald Trump won by 36% in 2016.

And earlier today, President Barack Obama endorsed our campaign, saying Mayor Gillum "is a proven fighter with the courage and determination" to stand up for all Floridians.

The momentum is on our side -- just look at this picture from Palatka -- but we need your help to let every voter in Florida know that Mayor Andrew Gillum will lead our state forward. **[Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more to help us get out the vote in the final weeks before Election Day?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36de/9e00690/5e37f1a2/2401c5c9/2579726082/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4094&refcode=em18_181001_Palatk_fnd_gq_act__ZL_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181001_Palatk_fnd_gq_act__ZL_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in++ask++or+")**

As Governor, Mayor Gillum will fight to make healthcare a right, not a privilege, invest in our children's education, and protect the environment for future generations of Floridians. And over the next 36 days, we'll be talking to voters across the state to make sure they know it.

**[This is our chance to elect a Governor who will put everyday people first again -- but we need your help to bring it home on Tuesday, November 6. So please, chip in $5 now and let's keep the momentum going.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36de/9e00690/5e37f1a2/2401c5cb/2579726082/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4094&refcode=em18_181001_Palatk_fnd_gq_act__ZL_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181001_Palatk_fnd_gq_act__ZL_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+This+is+our+chance+to+elect+a+Governor+w")**

Bring it home,

Zach Learner
Deputy Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

name: Mike Braun
subject: Thank you
body:
Peter,

We did it! Thanks to your support our campaign was able to SURPASS our fundraising goal this quarter. This was such an important deadline and I am so grateful for every single person who helped me exceed my fundraising goal. Thank You!

Hoosiers know that Joe Donnelly cannot be trusted to represent them in Washington, but now is the time to keep the energy behind our campaign growing!

With just over a month until Election Day, I am thankful for everything that we have accomplished this year and look forward to serving as your future Senator to represent the great state of Indiana.

My family and I are grateful for your support!

On to Victory,

Mike Braun

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you are no longer interested you can unsubscribe instantly:
https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jjhjghl-kujulhlke-r/

#
# **_President Trump Has Just Revolutionized Global Trade by Replacing NAFTA with USMCA_**
#
“Trump administration negotiators reached a major agreement with Canada on trade over the weekend. The breakthrough, which came on the heels of an earlier deal with Mexico, vindicates President Trump’s tough approach to reforming trade and will mark a fundamental turning point for American jobs and global power,” Christian Whiton, Senior Fellow at the Center for the National Interest, writes for Fox News. By reinvigorating American car manufacturing and aiding our farmers, “the new U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA), which replaces the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA), is much more than just a new name.” [**Click here to read more**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/trump-has-just-revolutionized-global-trade-by-replacing-nafta-with-usmca) “Whether you're a Democrat, Republican, or an independent, you should welcome President Trump's announcement of the new United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, or USMCA, on Monday,” Tom Rogan writes in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/from-nafta-to-usmca-trump-just-got-a-win-for-america). “A replacement for NAFTA, the USMCA will increase U.S. access to Canadian markets and ensure greater centering of the car industry in North America.” In [**_The Associated Press_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://apnews.com/eb85c1526eba4647bdba68edc0b2b322?utm_campaign=SocialFlow&utm_medium=AP_Politics&utm_source=Twitter), Darlene Superville reports that First Lady Melania Trump made the first stop of her Africa trip this week at an infant clinic in Ghana. She also met with Ghana’s first lady, Rebecca Akufo-Addo. “Mrs. Trump is on a five-day tour with planned stops in Malawi, Kenya and Egypt,” in addition to Ghana, Superville writes. “Conferring the Medal of Honor on a former Army medic, President Donald Trump praised recipient Ronald Shurer II on Monday as an inspiration who saved lives in Afghanistan, served as a special agent in the Secret Service, and is now battling cancer,” David Jackson and Tom Vanden Brook report for [**_USA Today_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2018/10/01/medal-honor-recipient-inspiration-donald-trump-says/1488969002/). “He's been fighting it every single day,” President Trump said during a ceremony at the White House yesterday. “He's a warrior.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1NjQ5MzkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY0OTM5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkzNTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

She also met with Ghana’s first lady, Rebecca Akufo-Addo. “Mrs. Trump is on a five-day tour with planned stops in Malawi, Kenya and Egypt,” in addition to Ghana, Superville writes. “Conferring the Medal of Honor on a former Army medic, President Donald Trump praised recipient Ronald Shurer II on Monday as an inspiration who saved lives in Afghanistan, served as a special agent in the Secret Service, and is now battling cancer,” David Jackson and Tom Vanden Brook report for . “He's been fighting it every single day,” President Trump said during a ceremony at the White House yesterday. “He's a warrior.” | |

| | Hey friend, **Big things are happening in Rhode Island.** Two days ago, Vice President Joe Biden was here, speaking alongside Governor Gina Raimondo at a rally to over a thousand fired up Democrats. And yesterday, President Barack Obama announced his endorsement of Governor Raimondo. But endorsements don't win elections -- the grassroots support of people like you do. **[Click here now and do your part by registering to volunteer!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a000/5e076a9e/54fb9c36/14425219/773931757/VEsE/ "https://raimondo.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/volunteer")** Gina Raimondo is the real deal. She's accomplished so much for Rhode Island -- taking us from the highest unemployment in the nation to the lowest unemployment since 2000. She's working hard to ensure that everyone has access to the skills and training that they need to keep up and get ahead. She's protecting our access to affordable healthcare, and taking steps to keep our communities safe from gun violence. And I can promise you this: she's just getting started. In her second term, she will bring even more of the change we need, and she won't stop standing up for every Rhode Islander. **[Will you stand up for Rhode Island too, by volunteering now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a000/5e076a9e/54fb9c36/14425219/773931757/VEsF/ "https://raimondo.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/volunteer")** Thank you for your support. Gabe Amo

name: Jason Yates
subject: Is your church ready to vote?
body:
Peter,
The election is less than 35 days away, and we still have a lot of work to do to motivate and equip the 90 million eligible Christian voters in this country. I need your help, and I’m inviting you to stand with us and get involved today.
What’s the greatest way you can help? Introduce your church to the My Faith Votes toolkit so they can help inspire the entire congregation to vote in November.
It’s been estimated as many as 50 million Christians could sit on the sidelines this election. Issues of religious liberty, the sanctity of life, and marriage and family are at stake on the local, state and national level.
It’s critical our churches stand for biblical values at the voting booth.
Will you please take a few minutes to make sure your pastor and church leadership have the right tools to help every member of your congregation vote?
We’ve already written an email [here](mailto:?subject=Materials%20for%20our%20Church&body=Dear%20Pastor,%0A%0AI%E2%80%99m%20writing%20to%20share%20with%20you%20an%20initiative%20I%20believe%20could%20be%20impactful%20for%20our%20church%20and%20community.%0A%0AA%20non-partisan%20organization%20called%20My%20Faith%20Votes%20is%20working%20to%20inspire%20Christians%20to%20pray%20for%20God%E2%80%99s%20wisdom,%20think%20according%20to%20a%20biblical%20worldview,%20and%20vote%20in%20each%20election.%0A%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20estimated%20that%20in%20the%20November%20election,%20more%20than%2051%20million%20Christians%20will%20sit%20on%20the%20sidelines%20and%20not%20vote.%0A%0AThere%20are%20more%20than%2010,000%20verified%20elections%20on%20November%206th.%20Imagine%20the%20impact%20our%20church%20can%20have%20on%20our%20community%20if%20we%20all%20showed%20up%20to%20vote%20from%20a%20biblical%20worldview!%0A%0AMy%20Faith%20Votes%20has%20put%20together%20non-partisan,%20faith-based%20resources%20designed%20specifically%20for%20churches%20to%20help%20congregations%20register%20and%20vote.%0A%0AThese%20resources%20include%20in-service%20announcement%20videos,%20slides,%20and%20sample%20sermon%20outlines.%20%20They%20also%20offer%20a%20free%20Personal%20Voter%20Assistant%20to%20help%20Christians%20register%20to%20vote,%20request%20absentee%20ballots,%20locate%20their%20polling%20places,%20and%20receive%20voting%20reminders.%0A%0AYou%20can%20view%20the%20resources%20here:%20https://www.myfaithvotes.org/think/churches/resources/%0A%0AI%20would%20love%20to%20see%20our%20church%20be%20part%20of%20inspiring%20Christians%20to%20bring%20biblical%20values%20to%20the%20voting%20booth%20and%20would%20happily%20assist%20the%20church%20anyway%20I%20can%20in%20this%20effort.%0A%0AThank%20you%20for%20considering%20these%20resources!%20I%E2%80%99m%20grateful%20for%20your%20leadership%20of%20our%20church%20and%20faithfully%20teaching%20the%20word%20of%20God%20and%20His%20principles.%0A%0ASincerely,) you can send to your pastor today to share the non-partisan voting resources with your church. Check out the incredible My Faith Votes [church resources page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iR1rNUifU0DsjIH-_XolC9dLMJN226SeolA74EClahPznoaFpKCJneUigqRzihovVLrAfjEkZY3o_iZXGUWZ95n0xht2vfGsb9BXVww9kwMX&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181002com01&n=2) on our website to see all the materials we provide for churches across America.
**Here’s what is important to keep in mind as you approach your pastor:**
1. We are not suggesting your church endorse a political party
2. We are not suggesting your church support particular candidates
3. What we are asking is that your church makes a simple announcement encouraging the congregation to pray, think and vote!

There is just a matter of weeks left before the election – but it’s not too late for churches to get involved by making an announcement or sending an email to their congregations.
Thank you for your commitment to helping other Christians vote.
Please prayerfully consider reaching out to your church today!
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181002com01&n=3)
**P.S.** Check out the [My Faith Votes Get Involved Page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaDyqlKk5PWlx-E94LM-jfBRb9Ts_n1mDD4_YawR97Kaj1TEWzMVJUb3eLY7osQZ5uzomWApH7-YpkcQ0Mq5cKw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181002com01&n=4) to learn of 4 additional ways you can get involved and make a difference before the November elections!
[](www.myfaithvotes.org/donate)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181002com01&n=5).

| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=130A150A9A3887)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=130A150A9A3888)
---
| | **

Friends,

In case you haven't seen, San Francisco and several other Democrat-led cities around the country have put forward resolutions that would allow all non-citizens, including illegal immigrants, to vote in elections. I don't know about you, but I firmly oppose this idea.

Last week, the House responded by [passing H. Res. 1071](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=130A150A9A3889), which recognizes that "allowing illegal immigrants the right to vote... diminishes the voting power of United States citizens."

****I was proud to support the measure. The right to vote is an important privilege that should be reserved for American citizens. I certainly don't appreciate Democrat efforts to water this privilege down and sway elections, and I'll continue to fight against these actions.** **

****\- Martha

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: What we're focused on:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36d4/9e00690/5e145b5b/2401c281/3075541882/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181002_EOQTY_fnd_gq_nono__AG_ettx&source=em18_181002_EOQTY_fnd_gq_nono__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Thank you for believing in a better future for Florida. Thank you for believing in this campaign. And thank you for believing in me.

Eighteen months ago, we launched this campaign because everyday Floridians deserve a Governor who will put them first. We deserve someone who isn't afraid to stand up and fight for the issues that matter most to us, no matter the consequences. And I know we couldn't have made it this far without you.

Almost 68,000 grassroots supporters have chipped in to fuel this people-powered movement and help us keep up the momentum, ever since that first day.

**And now, we're entering the last 35 days of this campaign with energy and optimism for what lies ahead.** But, I'm not going to lie -- last month we were up against a lot of attacks, and we know they're going to keep coming.

But instead of dwelling on their false and negative attacks, our focus is on building this people-powered movement into one that can take back the Governor's mansion. We're focused on finding solutions that will move Florida forward -- from affordable healthcare, to protecting the environment, to investing in public education -- and planning out policies that will make our solutions a reality.

We're focusing on what really matters: you. And I can't wait to see what we're going to accomplish together next.

Thank you, again.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

body:
Yesterday, I shared the exciting news that our campaign had earned the support of Vice President Biden -- and today, I'm so glad to share that President Obama has joined Team Spanberger as well!
| | Peter, Yesterday, I shared the exciting news that our campaign had earned the support of Vice President Biden -- and today, I'm so glad to share that **President Obama has joined Team Spanberger as well!** _This is a sincere honor, Peter._ President Obama's optimistic vision for this country inspired millions of Americans to become involved in our democracy. He is an advocate for economic fairness and equality for all, and it means so much that he believes in our campaign here in Central Virginia. And speaking personally --**this is an incredibly humbling moment.** A year ago, when we were just a few months into this campaign to bring new leadership to VA-7, I could have only imagined we would earn the support of the former President and Vice President. [**If you can, please consider joining President Obama in supporting our campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/GJVAgL7ApUowUBSfkeUVV0BUFLXXt93_oK8z7A3ZdSI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.02_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **We are now exactly five weeks away from Election Day,** and to win this tied race, we must keep up the fight until the polls close on November 6th. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Abigail Spanberger Sent: Mon, Oct 1, 8:29 PM Subject: Vice President Biden's gracious endorsement Friends, I'm fortunate to have an incredible team of supporters behind me, powering this campaign. And today, I am excited to announce a very special addition to Team Spanberger: **_former Vice President Joe Biden,_ who has endorsed our campaign in VA-7!** I am incredibly humbled by Vice President Biden's gracious endorsement, friends. Because of his steadfast leadership, enduring optimism, and abiding belief in the power of public service, Vice President Biden has played a transformational role in shaping the future of our country for the better. I hope you can take a minute to read Vice President Biden's kind words, from his endorsement announcement below, [**and then consider making a grassroots donation today so our campaign can continue to gain strength.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/GJVAgL7ApUowUBSfkeUVV0BUFLXXt93_oK8z7A3ZdSI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.02_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Here is what Vice President Biden had to say about our campaign:_ "In all my years in politics, I can say that Abigail is the only former CIA Operative and Girl Scout Leader that I have had the good fortune to endorse," he said. **" And I'm proud to do so because I know Abigail has what it takes to win in November.** As a member of Congress, Abigail will work across the aisle to deliver common sense solutions and have a lasting and positive impact on the lives of the people of the 7th District." Armed with this endorsement and our growing support on the ground, we are entering the final five weeks of this race with strength, friends. [**If you would like to help us celebrate this news and keep up our efforts, you can donate to the campaign here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/GJVAgL7ApUowUBSfkeUVV0BUFLXXt93_oK8z7A3ZdSI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.02_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, \- Abigail P.S. Thanks to this grassroots team, we had a tremendous end of the third fundraising quarter last night, meeting a _very_ ambitious goal. Thank you for [**your continued support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/GJVAgL7ApUowUBSfkeUVV0BUFLXXt93_oK8z7A3ZdSI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.02_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) of this campaign; we will win this race together. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/GJVAgL7ApUowUBSfkeUVV0BUFLXXt93_oK8z7A3ZdSI=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.02_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/GJVAgL7ApUowUBSfkeUVV0BUFLXXt93_oK8z7A3ZdSI=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/GLz_A3mJKFI74N4Ek81hmV4KoqPNHFyftHHth7V7NtA=/Koj9EBBk--6vozowqVJVIpOk7DqgcR4m_zwso7k5nCs=)_

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
| Peter -- Last night, President Trump was in Tennessee campaigning for my opponent, Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn. Presidential visits may be good for raising money from Washington special interests. But at the end of the day, I know from experience that Tennesseans are independent thinkers who make up their minds based on a candidate’s qualifications for the job. For example, when I ran for Governor, President George W. Bush fired up Air Force One to campaign for my opponent so many times that I lost count. In the end, I won because Tennessee voters considered their choices and made an informed decision. In this Senate race, I’m more interested in talking with voters about issues that matter rather than chasing endorsements. While Congresswoman Blackburn was skipping last night’s scheduled debate in Chattanooga in order to declare her 100% allegiance to President Trump, I went ahead and hosted a forum to hear from Chattanoogans and Southeast Tennesseans about their ideas and concerns. Last night pretty much sums up the difference between my opponent and me. Looking ahead: Tennessee voters have a clear choice in this Senate race. If they want more of the same shouting and bickering from Washington, then I'm not their candidate. But if voters want to hire someone who has a track record of getting things done for Tennessee, then I'm applying for the job. **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can so we can tune out this noise coming from Washington and keep our race focused on Tennessee? Your support in these final weeks is key to making sure we have the resources we’ll need to win.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2445132/13905779/-2072596439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODcxODJmOC04OGM2LWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EV2-tesT5bXJQ5-ZxtefuowWP-V1UKM1VCWUJREutOg=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181002-trump-1-express-10&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

clean_body: | Peter -- Last night, President Trump was in Tennessee campaigning for my opponent, Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn. Presidential visits may be good for raising money from Washington special interests. But at the end of the day, I know from experience that Tennesseans are independent thinkers who make up their minds based on a candidate’s qualifications for the job. For example, when I ran for Governor, President George W. Bush fired up Air Force One to campaign for my opponent so many times that I lost count. In the end, I won because Tennessee voters considered their choices and made an informed decision. In this Senate race, I’m more interested in talking with voters about issues that matter rather than chasing endorsements. While Congresswoman Blackburn was skipping last night’s scheduled debate in Chattanooga in order to declare her 100% allegiance to President Trump, I went ahead and hosted a forum to hear from Chattanoogans and Southeast Tennesseans about their ideas and concerns. Last night pretty much sums up the difference between my opponent and me. Looking ahead: Tennessee voters have a clear choice in this Senate race. If they want more of the same shouting and bickering from Washington, then I'm not their candidate. But if voters want to hire someone who has a track record of getting things done for Tennessee, then I'm applying for the job. Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can so we can tune out this noise coming from Washington and keep our race focused on Tennessee? Your support in these final weeks is key to making sure we have the resources we’ll need to win. The White House • October 2, 2018
## What Republicans and Democrats say about America’s new trade deal
##
##
**From the White House Rose Garden yesterday** , President Donald J. Trump announced America’s newest trade agreement with Mexico and Canada. The deal, which turns the page on the 24-year-old NAFTA, modernizes and rebalances the relationship with two of America’s biggest trade partners. **The[wave of support](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1Njg3NzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY4Nzc0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MDE5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wtas-support-president-donald-j-trumps-successful-trade-negotiations-mexico-canada/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **that followed yesterday’s announcement was broad—and revealing, including Republicans, Democrats, business leaders, and labor unions:
* _Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY)_ : “As someone who voted against NAFTA and opposed it for many years, I knew it needed fixing. The president deserves praise for taking large steps to improve it.”
* _House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA)_ : “President Trump has proved his critics wrong again by delivering on his promise to renegotiate NAFTA in America’s favor.”
* [**_Vox’s Alexia Fernández Campbell_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1Njg3NzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY4Nzc0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MDE5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2018/10/2/17925424/trump-mexico-trade-deal-nafta-workers-labor) : “Trump’s new trade deal is better for workers than NAFTA was.”
* _United Steelworkers International President Leo Gerard_ on new worker’s rights provisions: “Stronger than the rejected Trans-Pacific Partnership (TPP). It goes farther than any prior trade agreement.”

**One big problem with NAFTA** is that it left American manufacturers in the dust. The new U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) incentivizes billions of dollars in additional U.S. vehicle and auto parts production, among other wins for American exporters. “Manufacturers are extremely encouraged that our call for a trilateral agreement between the United States, Canada and Mexico has been answered,” National Association of Manufacturers President Jay Timmons says. **Protection for American farmers** was also notably absent from NAFTA. No longer, as new provisions—including one that eliminates Canada’s “Class 7” program used to undersell American dairy products—will provide new market access for U.S. farmers, ranchers, and agribusiness. “This was a hard-fought win,” American Farm Bureau Federation President Zippy Duvall said of the USMCA. [**USMCA wins bipartisan praise as a victory for American workers**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1Njg3NzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY4Nzc0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MDE5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/usmca-wins-praise-victory-american-industries-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **In case you missed it:** [**Newly negotiated USMCA puts American interests first**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1Njg3NzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY4Nzc0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MDE5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://wjla.com/news/bottom-line/opinion-the-newly-negotiated-usmca-trade-deal-puts-american-interests-first)
## Good news for Americans living paycheck-to-paycheck
##
**“National wage growth is at the highest** it’s been in nearly 17 months — and, according to a new study released by Glassdoor, it’s not expected to slow down anytime soon,” Megan Henney reports for Fox News today. **The booming American comeback** is good news for all workers, but this latest headline is especially positive for Americans living paycheck-to-paycheck, as those paychecks are getting a little bigger on average. **“We expect wages to continue to rise** as demand remains for workers throughout a number of industries,” Glassdoor economist Daniel Zhao said. Henney reports that wages grew 2.6 percent year-over-year from 2017, rising to $52,664. Some industries, such as certain health care roles, saw annual pay grow by as much as nearly 7 percent. [**Fox Business: “US Wage Growth Hits 17-Month High”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAyLjk1Njg3NzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMi45NTY4Nzc0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MDE5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/fox-business-us-wage-growth-hits-17-month-high/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

name: Irene Lin
subject: Subject: Steve King proves why he’s the worst for women. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Sometimes working on this campaign, I get outrage fatigue having to deal every day with another Steve King embarrassing quote that exposes his callous disregard for women. Earlier this year, Steve King was named as one of the “15 Worst for Women in Congress.” He claimed no men could “ever qualify” to be on the Supreme Court again due to supposed unjust standards of human decency. Today, he showed why again he’s on that list when he said the following:
Using King’s logic, if you are rob a bank, you don’t know it until you get caught. If you run a red light, you don’t know it unless you get a ticket. **This line of thinking is as ridiculous as it is dangerous. It’s why the #metoo movement exists and why we so desperately need change in Congress.**

_“No, Steve King, you're a harasser the moment you do something to someone without their consent! It's attitudes like this that make sexual harassment so prevalent in our society.”_

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: "environmental protection"
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36d7/9e00690/5e66588c/2401cc7a/354391225/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181002_Enviro_engg_gq_nono_resend_AG_ettx&source=em18_181002_Enviro_engg_gq_nono_resend_AG_ettx")
Friends --

Between our coastlines, the Everglades, and diverse wildlife, our state is home to some of the most majestic places on Earth. I feel lucky to be from the great state of Florida every day -- but I'm worried my children, and their children, won't feel the same.

Under Rick Scott, environmental protections have been pushed aside in favor of corporate gain. Red tide and toxic algae are historically out of control.

Our air quality, water quality, sea-life, and ecosystem belong to all of us -- not to any individual, not to any corporation, and not to any Governor. The Governor's job, first and foremost, is to do what is in the interest of all Floridians, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

**[If we continue ignoring science in favor of corporate gain, future generations will be the ones to suffer the consequences. Add your name to demand our environment is prioritized.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36d7/9e00690/5e66588c/2401cc7d/354391225/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-protect-our-environment?gpsid=13_55_4103&source=em18_181002_Enviro_engg_gq_nono_resend_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181002_Enviro_engg_gq_nono_resend_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+If+we+continue+ignoring+science+in+favor")**

Listen, no corporate profit is worth destroying our clean air and water.

If we want our children and grandchildren to experience the wonders our state has to offer, we must start making real strides to protect our environment. It's time Floridians have a leader with a proven record of standing up to attacks on our environment -- one who will ensure that future generations can enjoy our planet's resources.

As Governor, I'll put the "environmental protection" back in the Florida Department of Environmental Protection. But we can't just wait until November to start demanding better -- we need to take action now.

**[Add your name next to mine to protect our environment for now and future generations to come.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36d7/9e00690/5e66588c/2401cc7c/354391225/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-protect-our-environment?gpsid=13_55_4103&source=em18_181002_Enviro_engg_gq_nono_resend_AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181002_Enviro_engg_gq_nono_resend_AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+next+to+mine+to+protect+ou")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Friends -- Between our coastlines, the Everglades, and diverse wildlife, our state is home to some of the most majestic places on Earth. I feel lucky to be from the great state of Florida every day -- but I'm worried my children, and their children, won't feel the same. Under Rick Scott, environmental protections have been pushed aside in favor of corporate gain. Red tide and toxic algae are historically out of control. Our air quality, water quality, sea-life, and ecosystem belong to all of us -- not to any individual, not to any corporation, and not to any Governor. The Governor's job, first and foremost, is to do what is in the interest of all Floridians, not just the wealthy and well-connected. "" Listen, no corporate profit is worth destroying our clean air and water. If we want our children and grandchildren to experience the wonders our state has to offer, we must start making real strides to protect our environment. It's time Floridians have a leader with a proven record of standing up to attacks on our environment -- one who will ensure that future generations can enjoy our planet's resources. As Governor, I'll put the "environmental protection" back in the Florida Department of Environmental Protection. But we can't just wait until November to start demanding better -- we need to take action now. "" Bring it home, Andrew Gillum "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing today with some wonderful news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
This is what happens when we stand up and fight for justice together.
#

Sisters and Brothers,
Today as a result of your help, we have won a major victory for American workers.
This morning, after a long campaign, Jeff Bezos of Amazon announced that the company would raise its minimum wage for all United States employees to $15 an hour — a move that will impact more than 350,000 full-time, part-time and temporary workers.
I want to thank the Amazon workers who worked with us on this campaign and the more than 100,000 of you who signed a petition demanding that Mr. Bezos do exactly what he announced today. This is what happens when we stand up and fight for justice together.
I also want to give credit where credit is due, and that is to applaud Jeff Bezos for his decision today. It is no secret that I have been a harsh critic of the wage and employment practices of Amazon and Mr. Bezos. Today he did the right thing. And the decision could very well be a shot heard around the world because there is no reason why other profitable corporations should not follow his lead.
The time is now for Walmart, McDonald's and the fast food industry, the airline industry, and the retail industry in general to start paying their workers a living wage — at least $15 per hour. The American people are tired of having to subsidize profitable corporations who pay their workers wages that are so low that many of them are forced to go on food stamps, Medicaid, subsidized housing and other federal programs. That has got to change, and Mr. Bezos’ decision today is a major step forward in that direction.
**When I talk about the political revolution — people standing up in their communities and at their workplace and fighting for change — I mean exactly what the Amazon workers and people everywhere did to achieve this victory.**
But this fight is far from over because it is not just Amazon workers who deserve a $15 minimum wage. No worker in America should be forced to live in poverty.
I am more convinced than ever after this morning’s news that if we continue to fight for each other — for economic, social, racial and environmental justice — we will win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

clean_body: This is what happens when we stand up and fight for justice together. Sisters and Brothers, Today as a result of your help, we have won a major victory for American workers. This morning, after a long campaign, Jeff Bezos of Amazon announced that the company would raise its minimum wage for all United States employees to $15 an hour — a move that will impact more than 350,000 full-time, part-time and temporary workers. I want to thank the Amazon workers who worked with us on this campaign and the more than 100,000 of you who signed a petition demanding that Mr. Bezos do exactly what he announced today. This is what happens when we stand up and fight for justice together. I also want to give credit where credit is due, and that is to applaud Jeff Bezos for his decision today. It is no secret that I have been a harsh critic of the wage and employment practices of Amazon and Mr. Bezos. Today he did the right thing. And the decision could very well be a shot heard around the world because there is no reason why other profitable corporations should not follow his lead. The time is now for Walmart, McDonald's and the fast food industry, the airline industry, and the retail industry in general to start paying their workers a living wage — at least $15 per hour. The American people are tired of having to subsidize profitable corporations who pay their workers wages that are so low that many of them are forced to go on food stamps, Medicaid, subsidized housing and other federal programs. That has got to change, and Mr. Bezos’ decision today is a major step forward in that direction. When I talk about the political revolution — people standing up in their communities and at their workplace and fighting for change — I mean exactly what the Amazon workers and people everywhere did to achieve this victory. But this fight is far from over because it is not just Amazon workers who deserve a $15 minimum wage. No worker in America should be forced to live in poverty. I am more convinced than ever after this morning’s news that if we continue to fight for each other — for economic, social, racial and environmental justice — we will win. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders We have a modest fundraising goal to hit to support Bernie’s re-election campaign and his work traveling the country to rally with progressive candidates. Will you make a $3 donation today?** Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

clean_body: If you want to know where Tammy Baldwin stands, just look at the elitists who support her. The latest liberal big shot to endorse her is none other... Friend, If you want to know where Tammy Baldwin stands, just look at the elitists who support her. The latest liberal big shot to endorse her is none other than President Barack Obama. It’s just another reminder that Tammy Baldwin stands for radical liberals, not with Wisconsin. Under President Obama, our taxes were high. Under President Obama, our economy failed. Under President Obama, America signed on to terrible plans like the Iran deal and trade deals that cost American jobs. Tammy Baldwin may not remember all that, but WE DO. And no matter how many DC donors Obama brings to Tammy Baldwin, we’ve still got a fighting chance to defeat her. But only if we work together now. The truth is, President Obama and Tammy Baldwin want the same thing: to stop President Trump from succeeding. They want a liberal Supreme Court, they want to repeal tax reform, and some liberals are even promising to impeach our President if liberals succeed at the polls this fall. They’re willing to do just about anything to stop us. But friend, we’ve made so much progress these last two years, and if we fight now to send liberal obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin home, we can do even better next year! Friend, we’ve seen what Obama didn’t do for us. We know where the liberal policies of the past get us. And we know what six more years of Tammy Baldwin would mean for Wisconsin. And all I can say to that is “NO THANKS, Obama!” I hope you will chip in today to help defeat Tammy Baldwin and fight back against Barack Obama and the liberal elites: Thanks, friend. Together, we can bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

body:

body:
|

| | In just a little over a month, the campaign will be over. It will be too late to knock on a door, call up a friend, or get someone you know to the polls to vote for Democrats up-and-down the ticket. [**Peter -- what do you plan to do in this final month to make this campaign a success?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe4c/4462dc26/780165dd/2019b984/998025087/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181002oh") This team has some big plans over the next month to make sure we are successful on Election Day. Here are a few ways you can help:
* Knock on doors.
* Make phone calls to fellow Ohioans.
* Text out the vote.
* Recruit your family and friends to join Team Sherrod.
* [**Donate to the campaign.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe4c/4462dc26/780165dd/2019be7b/998025087/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181002oh?refcode=sbe181002oh_m")

| | | [TELL US YOUR PLANS HERE ->](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe4c/4462dc26/780165dd/2019b984/998025087/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181002oh")
---
This is the point in every campaign where every action -- no matter what it is -- will make a big impact on the result. In 2016, President Trump won Ohio by 8 points. We can't take any second for granted or leave anything on the table.
Every action you take will bring us closer to victory in November.
[**Let me know how you plan to help in the final month of the campaign by clicking this link.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe4c/4462dc26/780165dd/2019b984/998025087/VEsC/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181002oh")

Sherrod

name: Katie Z. (via AndrewGillum.com)
subject: I was lucky
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36d6/9e00690/5e7a0d8f/2401c81f/2683693116/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181002_katie_fnd_gq_ful__KZ_ettx&source=em18_181002_katie_fnd_gq_ful__KZ_ettx")
Friends,

In second grade, I studied hard for spelling tests. With my parents' help, I memorized all the words and could recite them by heart. But when it came time to take the exam, I faltered -- I just couldn't process spelling words I'd taken so much time to learn.

Eventually, we learned that my disabilities were caused by Neurofibromatosis Type 1, a genetic disorder I was born with -- and one that's considered a pre-existing condition.

Once this was recognized, I was able to get the help I needed. I was the kid who stayed after school and put in extra work with special ed teachers -- my principal even helped track my progress. By high school, I was able to take advanced placement classes in English and History. And now, I have a Master's Degree and work in a field that I love.

**I knew how Neurofibromatosis could limit me, and I figured out how to overcome it -- but I also know that I was lucky. Without the teachers who spent time in and out of the classroom with me or access to affordable healthcare, my story would have ended a lot differently.**

A diagnosis like mine can devastate families. If I had been denied healthcare because of my pre-existing condition, I'm not sure what my family would've done. My condition requires regular, expensive tests to track the disease's growth, in addition to necessary medical care. If it weren't for Obamacare, I wouldn't be able to afford any of it.

Access to affordable healthcare and public education got me where I am today. And that's why I support Mayor Andrew Gillum for Governor of Florida. He believes that healthcare security is a fundamental right for all Floridians, and he knows that for every child to have the chance to succeed, we must properly fund public schools.

**[Mayor Gillum will prioritize what's best for all Floridians -- and I don't know about you, but I think it's long past time we had a Governor like that. Are you with me? Chip in $5 or more now to help Mayor Gillum bring it home this November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36d6/9e00690/5e7a0d8f/2401c817/2683693116/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-kz-hc-supporter?gpsid=8_55_4101&refcode=em18_181002_katie_fnd_gq_ful__KZ_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181002_katie_fnd_gq_ful__KZ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Mayor+Gillum+will+prioritize+whats+best+")**

Thanks,

Katie Z.
Proud Andrew Gillum Supporter
